message:
feat(tests): add 15 E2E security scenarios with JSONL artifact contract (bd-3fa19)

SEC-6.6 implementation: End-to-end security scenario suite covering:
- Benign extension lifecycle (preflight → runtime → clean artifacts)
- Adversarial preflight rejection under safe policy
- Runtime anomaly escalation (benign → adversarial → quarantine)
- Quota breach enforcement with per-extension overrides
- Policy profile transitions (safe → standard → permissive)
- Incident evidence bundle E2E with deterministic export
- Recovery after adversarial burst
- Multi-extension isolation verification
- Secret broker detection
- Exec mediation under strict policy
- JSONL artifact schema contract validation
- Deterministic artifact manifests (reproducibility)
- Shadow mode telemetry-only operation
- Filtered incident bundle scoping
- Full attack lifecycle golden path

Every scenario emits structured JSONL logs tagged with
pi.test.security_scenario.v1 schema including: issue_id, extension_id,
capability, policy_profile, score, reason_codes, action, and latency_ms.

Also fixes: make SecurityAlertCategoryCounts/SeverityCounts increment()
methods public for downstream consumers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
